_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: by 2 days, trametinib treatment induced a similar response to capmatinib in the NF1-MET tumors, strongly activating EGFR (Y1068), AXL (Y702), PKCz (L410/T403), and NFκB (S536)
details: By 2 days, strongly activated EGFR (Y1068), AXL (Y702), PKCz (L410/T403), and NFκB (S536) in NF1-MET tumors
